name: Cherry-Almond Glazed Pork Roast
recipeInstructions:
1. Rub the pork roast with a little salt and pepper.
2. Place the roast on a rack in a shallow roasting pan.
3. Roast, uncovered at 325°F for 2-4 hours.
4. In a saucepan, combine preserves, vinegar, corn syrup, spices, and 1/4 teaspoon salt.
5. Heat and stir until boiling, then reduce heat and simmer for 2 minutes.
6. Add almonds to the sauce.
7. Keep the sauce warm.
8. Spoon some sauce over the roast to glaze it.
9. Return the roast to the oven at 325°F until a meat thermometer reads 170°F, basting several times.
10. Remove from the oven and let stand for 10 minutes.
11. Slice the roast and pass remaining sauce over slices.
12. Serve hot.
